team.name: Dr. James Chen
team.title: Chief Cardiologist
team.bio: Dr. James Chen leads our cardiology division with expertise in interventional cardiology and heart failure management. Previously served at Johns Hopkins Medical Center.

team.name: Dr. Sarah Williams
team.title: Director of Mental Health
team.bio: Dr. Sarah Williams specializes in depression, anxiety, and trauma. She developed our AI-assisted mental health protocols and leads clinical research initiatives.

team.name: Dr. Michael Rodriguez
team.title: Chief Medical Officer
team.bio: Dr. Michael Rodriguez oversees clinical operations and telemedicine platforms. Expert in scalable medical systems and patient-centered care.

team.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
team.title: Oncology Specialist
team.bio: Dr. Priya Sharma leads oncology services with expertise in personalized cancer treatment and clinical trial management.

team.name: Dr. David Kim
team.title: Head of Preventive Medicine
team.bio: Dr. David Kim specializes in preventive health care and wellness programs. Leads AI-driven health prediction initiatives.

team.name: Jessica Martinez
team.title: Head Nurse - Clinical Coordination
team.bio: Jessica coordinates clinical care and patient support across all specialties. Expert in telemedicine patient protocols.

team.name: Robert Taylor
team.title: Nurse Specialist - Emergency Care
team.bio: Robert specializes in emergency triage and critical care coordination. Leads our 24/7 emergency response team.

team.name: Amy Khan
team.title: Mental Health Nurse
team.bio: Amy provides mental health support and crisis counseling. Expert in AI-assisted therapeutic protocols.

team.name: Dr. Lisa Brown
team.title: Licensed Therapist & Counselor
team.bio: Dr. Lisa Brown specializes in cognitive behavioral therapy and mental health support. Leads evidence-based intervention programs.

psychiatry.name: Psychiatry & Mental Health
psychiatry.description: Mental health and psychological wellness services

nursing.name: Nursing & Patient Care
